leadText: Jet Punch (Japanese: ジェットパンチ Jet Punch) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Palafin.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Jet Punch inflicts damage. It has a priority of +1, so is used before all moves that do not have increased priority.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Due to an oversight, Jet Punch used to have its damage boosted by Sheer Force despite not having any additional effects . This was later patched. This move originated as a TCG attack .
